sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short

sections.text:

financial year which ended on 31st December, 20 I 0, of the moneys

for the services by the Appropriation Act, 20 I 0, and the
Supplementary Appropriation (2009)Act, 2012, is hereby approved.
